scripts.dev:up: sh -c 'if [ -f .dev.pid ] && kill -0 $(cat .dev.pid) 2>/dev/null; then echo "dev server already running (pid $(cat .dev.pid))"; exit 0; fi; nohup npm run dev > .dev.log 2>&1 & echo $! > .dev.pid; echo "dev server started (pid $(cat .dev.pid))"'
scripts.dev:down: sh -c 'if [ ! -f .dev.pid ]; then echo "no .dev.pid file"; exit 0; fi; pid=$(cat .dev.pid); if kill -0 $pid 2>/dev/null; then kill $pid && echo "dev server stopped (pid $pid)"; else echo "process $pid is not running"; fi; rm -f .dev.pid'
scripts.dev:status: sh -c 'if [ -f .dev.pid ] && kill -0 $(cat .dev.pid) 2>/dev/null; then echo "running (pid $(cat .dev.pid))"; else echo "stopped"; fi'
scripts.dev:logs: sh -c 'if [ -f .dev.log ]; then tail -n 80 .dev.log; else echo "no .dev.log yet"; fi'
